name: zammad-mcp
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for maintaining the Zammad MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Maintainer workflows for the Zammad MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin that packages Zammad-MCP issue and PR digest skills, project quality guidance, curated maintainer references, and Codacy MCP integration for code quality review.
defaultPrompt: Review this change against project quality rules.
